title.en: A stream of information was transmitted to Ye T...

content.en:
Ye Tian broke through the fourth layer, and the Huanyu Tower directly unlocked the confinement of this area.

The True Xuan Great Ancestor who lived for the rest of his life after the catastrophe immediately ran away, lest he be pulled into the Huanyu Tower again.

Airplanes!

A stream of information was transmitted to Ye Tian.

At this moment, he had the true inheritance authority of the Huanyu Tower.

The True Transmission permission is much higher than the Core Permission, and you can directly obtain three Cosmos Orders.

Moreover, the True Transmission permission can be viewed at will with lower permissions, as well as the information of all the Great Ancestors of the Universal Alliance, etc.

In other words, the Great Ancestor of the True Inheritance Authority is the real high-level of the Huanyu Alliance.

"The Great Ancestor of the Universe thinks that all the Great Ancestors of the Universal Alliance are the same, but in fact they are still different!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, a great ancestor invited Ye Tian to enter the Universe Space-Time Network.

"It's a phosphorus-free ancestor!"

Ye Tian directly entered the Cosmos space-time network.

In a grand hall of the space-time network of the Universal Alliance, figures sat down one after another.

In the blink of an eye, twenty-three Great Ancestors arrived.

"Congratulations to the Endless Great Ancestor for obtaining the True Inheritance Authority!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Great Ancestor for obtaining the True Inheritance Authority!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Great Ancestor for obtaining the True Inheritance Authority!"

These Great Ancestors congratulated one after another.

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor also said: "Endless Great Ancestor, these are the Great Ancestors who have broken through the fourth layer of the Huanyu Tower and have the authority of true inheritance, and we can be regarded as the Great Ancestors of a circle." Originally, there were a total of 26 True Inheritance Authority Ancestors, and you would be 27 with the Endless Ancestors, but a few of them had not yet been contacted, so they did not come over. "

"I've seen all the Great Ancestors!"

Ye Tian greeted.

They invited Ye Tian to participate in such a meeting this time, just to get acquainted, which could be regarded as attracting Ye Tian into this circle.

Everyone's goal is very simple, that is, to become a Heavenly Ancestor.

Of course, most of the invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestors still wanted to become the Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor first, and then become the Heavenly Ancestor.

At the meeting, everyone chatted casually without any constraints.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked, "Fellow Ancestors, I want to trade some Red Dragon True Water, Void Shadow Liquid, and Immortal Boundary Stone, do you have any?"

"Endless Great Ancestor, do you want to cultivate the Heaven Slaying Blade?" said the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor said: "I have also obtained the inheritance of the Heaven Slaying Blade, but unfortunately I don't meet the conditions, after becoming the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, it is no longer realistic to want to raise the Infinite Bone to a super-grade quality!

"Yes!"

Ye Tian admitted, there was no need to hide it.

Hearing this, the Phosphorus-Free Ancestor became envious.

Ye Tian was collecting the materials needed for the Heaven Slaying Blade, maybe Ye Tian would meet the cultivation conditions, if he succeeded in collecting all the materials, he might be able to practice the Heaven Slaying Blade's immeasurable supernatural powers.

"Endless Great Ancestor, it's too difficult for you to trade these three materials within the Cosmos Alliance, we don't have them. However, you can go to Falcon Dragon City!" said the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

"Hayabusa Dragon City, where is this?"

Ye Tian had heard of this place for the first time.

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor introduced: "The Falcon Dragon City was once built by an existence called the Falcon Dragon Heavenly Ancestor, located in the Infinite Realm Ruins, but it was hidden, and ordinary Great Ancestors couldn't find it at all. The Falcon Dragon Ancestor has been lost for an endless time, but since Hayabusa Dragon City was once a trading city, it has continued since then. Now, as long as you reach the fifth stage of the invincible level Great Ancestor, you are eligible to enter Falcon Dragon City. And not long after, there will be an auction at the Heavenly Ancestor level, and the Invincible Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor is also eligible to participate, and these three materials may be traded. "

"Thank you for the advice of the Phosphorus-Free Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Soon after, the meeting ended.

Ye Tian and many great ancestors left contact information, and they could contact each other in the future.

......

Hayabusa Dragon City.

Ye Tian took a little time to rush here, Falcon Dragon City was located in a forbidden place in the Infinite Realm Ruins, and there were forbidden magic circles all over here, all of which were set up by the former Falcon Dragon Heavenly Ancestor.

It can be said that without the strength of the invincible level fifth stage Great Ancestor, it is dangerous to enter here.

When Ye Tian came to the entrance of Falcon Dragon City, he saw a corpse with an immeasurable realm.

These Infinite Realm Armorers were actually patrolling, serving as guards.

Seeing this scene, he was completely shocked.

"Falcon Dragon City is too arrogant!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

After all, each Boundless Realm Armor Warrior is comparable to an Invincible Level 5 Stage Overlord, and if dozens of Infinite Realm Armor Warriors are combined into a battle array, they can also kill the Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor and the ordinary Heavenly Ancestor.

Being able to take out so many Infinite Realm Armor Warriors at will means that the forces behind Falcon Dragon City have the ability to kill Heavenly Ancestors.

Only in this way did the Heavenly Ancestors not dare to mess around when they came here, which created a good trading environment in Falcon Dragon City.

However, he soon discovers that he knows too little about Hayabusa Dragon City.

It's not a simple city of trade.

......

Falcon Dragon City, Dream Tower.

Ye Tian saw that an invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor and a few Heavenly Ancestors had entered here, so he also went in to take a look.

When he entered the Dream Fighting Tower, he found that these Great Ancestors and the Heavenly Ancestors were engaged in a gambling battle.

I saw that in the void, a microcosm of heaven and earth was presented here.

At this time, a Heavenly Ancestor stood on top of the miniature and said, "This gambling battle is held by our Tianqing Mountain, a total of sixteen teams have entered the Purple River Realm, which side gets more resources and which side kills the most enemies, everyone can place bets." The bet only accepts gold coins from the Heavenly Realm, or rare materials, and ordinary treasures cannot be betted!"

"Bet on the lives of a group of fifth-stage lifeforms?"

Ye Tian felt that his cognition was shattered.

Suddenly, he thought that he had used the token of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor to go to the Evil Blue Land, could it be that the Evil Blue Land was also a gambling battle like this?

If you think about it carefully, the resources he obtained at the beginning were very precious to the fourth stage or the ordinary fifth stage great ancestors, but they were of little significance to the invincible fifth stage great ancestors.

For the Heavenly Ancestors, it must be a bunch of ordinary items.

The other Great Ancestors also said that this was just a game of the Heavenly Ancestors.

Now it seems that this is a game of gambling, and Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor is undoubtedly official, throwing out a little resource to let a group of ordinary fifth-stage great ancestors and a few fourth-stage great ancestors work hard to make money for them!

Soon, the gambling battle began!

Many Invincible-level Fifth Stage Great Ancestors began to place bets, obviously indulging in them.

Ye Tian did not lack gold coins in the Heavenly Realm, so he did not bet and chose to leave directly.

He had little interest in such a gamble.

Soon, he came to the Tower of Death in Hayabusa Dragon City.
